mapper.update: UPDATE PLACE SET PLC_NAME = #{dto.plcName}, PLC_ADDR = #{dto.plcAddr}, PLC_DADDR = #{dto.plcDaddr}, PLC_TELNO = #{dto.plcTelno}, PLC_HOMEPAGE = #{dto.plcHomepage}, PLC_OVERVIEW = #{dto.plcOverview}, PLC_UP_DATE = NOW() WHERE PLC_NO = #{plcNo}

UPDATE PLACE_SLEEP SET SLEEP_CHECK_IN = #{dto.sleepCheckIn}, SLEEP_CHECK_OUT = #{dto.sleepCheckOut}, SLEEP_INFOCENTER = #{dto.sleepInfocenter}, SLEEP_PARKING = #{dto.sleepParking}, SLEEP_RESERVATION = #{dto.sleepReservation}, SLEEP_RESERVATION_URL = #{dto.sleepReservationUrl}, SLEEP_SUB_FACILITY = #{dto.sleepSubFacility}, SLEEP_BARBECU = #{dto.sleepBarbecu}, SLEEP_BEAUTY = #{dto.sleepBeauty}, SLEEP_BEVERAGE = #{dto.sleepBeverage}, SLEEP_BICYCLE = #{dto.sleepBicycle}, SLEEP_CAMPFIRE = #{dto.sleepCampfire}, SLEEP_FITNESS = #{dto.sleepFitness}, SLEEP_KARAOKE = #{dto.sleepKaraoke}, SLEEP_PUBLIC_BATH = #{dto.sleepPublicBath}, SLEEP_PUBLIC_PC = #{dto.sleepPublicPc}, SLEEP_SAUNA = #{dto.sleepSauna}, SLEEP_SEMINAR = #{dto.sleepSeminar}, SLEEP_SPORTS = #{dto.sleepSports}, SLEEP_UP_DATE = NOW() WHERE SLEEP_PLC_NO = #{plcNo}
mapper.select: SELECT p.PLC_NO AS plcNo, p.PLC_ID AS plcId, p.PLC_RGN_CD AS plcRgnCd, p.PLC_NAME AS plcName, p.PLC_ADDR AS plcAddr, p.PLC_DADDR AS plcDaddr, p.PLC_LAT AS plcLat, p.PLC_LOT AS plcLot, p.PLC_TELNO AS plcTelno, p.PLC_HOMEPAGE AS plcHomepage, p.PLC_OVERVIEW AS plcOverview, p.PLC_MAIN_IMG_URL AS plcMainImgUrl, p.PLC_THUM_IMG_URL AS plcThumImgUrl, p.PLC_FLT_CD AS plcFltCd, p.PLC_AVG_RATING AS plcAvgRating, p.PLC_REVIEW_CNT AS plcReviewCnt, s.SLEEP_CHECK_IN AS sleepCheckIn, s.SLEEP_CHECK_OUT AS sleepCheckOut, s.SLEEP_INFOCENTER AS sleepInfocenter, s.SLEEP_PARKING AS sleepParking, s.SLEEP_RESERVATION AS sleepReservation, s.SLEEP_RESERVATION_URL AS sleepReservationUrl, s.SLEEP_SUB_FACILITY AS sleepSubFacility, s.SLEEP_BARBECU AS sleepBarbecu, s.SLEEP_BEAUTY AS sleepBeauty, s.SLEEP_BEVERAGE AS sleepBeverage, s.SLEEP_BICYCLE AS sleepBicycle, s.SLEEP_CAMPFIRE AS sleepCampfire, s.SLEEP_FITNESS AS sleepFitness, s.SLEEP_KARAOKE AS sleepKaraoke, s.SLEEP_PUBLIC_BATH AS sleepPublicBath, s.SLEEP_PUBLIC_PC AS sleepPublicPc, s.SLEEP_SAUNA AS sleepSauna, s.SLEEP_SEMINAR AS sleepSeminar, s.SLEEP_SPORTS AS sleepSports FROM PLACE p LEFT JOIN PLACE_SLEEP s ON p.PLC_NO = s.SLEEP_PLC_NO WHERE p.PLC_NO = #{plcNo}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PLACE p WHERE p.PLC_CAT_CD = 'PLC004' AND p.PLC_USE_YN = 'Y'
AND p.PLC_RGN_CD = #{rgnCd}
